{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged claw
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A [[Forged claw]] can slash through [[Eithan]]'s [[Hollow Armor]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Sage]] uses a [[Forged claw]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
